items.summary: Add extensive backend logging in the isCallerAdmin method in backend/main.mo to output: 1) the raw caller principal from Principal.toText(caller), 2) the raw owner principal from Principal.toText(ownerPrincipal), 3) the exact boolean result of the equality comparison, 4) any intermediate conversion or comparison steps

Verify the owner principal initialization in backend/main.mo by adding logging during canister initialization that outputs: 1) whether an admin token was provided in init args, 2) the exact principal text extracted from the admin token, 3) confirmation that ownerPrincipal variable was set

Add frontend console logging in the App.tsx admin route that outputs: 1) the exact isAdmin boolean value returned from the backend call, 2) the type of the isAdmin value (typeof isAdmin), 3) the result of explicit boolean checks (isAdmin === true, isAdmin === false), 4) any error objects if the backend call fails

Review the backend actor initialization arguments and canister deployment configuration to verify the admin token containing principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' is being passed correctly during deployment
